Lyrics-
छोडी जाने मायालाई बिर्सुं कसरी ।
झल्को आउंदा यो मुटुमा दुख्छ बेसरी । 
तिम्रै यादमा तड्पी तड्पी बांचिराख्या छु ।
छुट्ने बेला देको रुमाल साची राख्या छु ।।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
मयाको सम्झना फिर्ता दिनुछ.. 2
किन छोड्यौ बिचैमा जवाफ लिनुछ ।।

तिम्ले अर्कै रोजे पनि मैले रोज्दिंन ।
तिम्रो बारे नराम्रो कहिले सोच्दिन ।।
मैले भन्दा धेरै माया उस्ले गरोस है ।
मेरो भागको सबै खुशी तिम्लाई परोस है ।।
कांडा हैन फुलै फुल होस तिम्रो बाटोमा ।
रुनै परे मै रुला नि तिम्रो साटोमा ।।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
मयाको सम्झना फिर्ता दिनुछ.. 2
किन छोड्यौ बिचैमा जवाफ लिनुछ ।।

कहिले रुवाउँछ मायाले कहिले हासाउँछ ।
टाढा हुँदा आँखाबाट आँशु रसाउँछ  ।।
दुई मुटुको साँचो कथा बोल्छ मायाले ।
आगोले झैं भतभती पोल्छ मायाले ।।
मिलन बिछोड पिरतीको गीतै रै'छ नि ।
पाउनु र गुमाउनु त रितै रै'छ नि ।।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
मयाको सम्झना फिर्ता दिनुछ.. 2
किन छोड्यौ बिचैमा जवाफ लिनुछ ।।

थाहा छैन कहां छौं, के गर्दै होलाउ ?
बिर्सियौ कि मायाले सम्झिदै रोलाउ ?
एकै झल्को देख्दा नि यो मन मान्थ्यो कि ।
भेटे तिम्लाई हुरुक्कै परान जान्थ्यो कि ।
छैन मलाई गुनासो तिम्रो घातैको ।
मर्नी बेलां पानी पाऊं तिम्रो हातैको ।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
मयाको सम्झना फिर्ता दिनुछ.. 2
किन छोड्यौ बिचैमा जवाफ लिनुछ ।।

Lyrics-
छोडी जाने मायालाई बिर्सुं कसरी ।
झल्को आउंदा यो मुटुमा दुख्छ बेसरी । 
तिम्रै यादमा तड्पी तड्पी बांचिराख्या छु ।
छुट्ने बेला देको रुमाल साची राख्या छु ।।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
मयाको सम्झना फिर्ता दिनुछ.. 2
किन छोड्यौ बिचैमा जवाफ लिनुछ ।।

तिम्ले अर्कै रोजे पनि मैले रोज्दिंन ।
तिम्रो बारे नराम्रो कहिले सोच्दिन ।।
मैले भन्दा धेरै माया उस्ले गरोस है ।
मेरो भागको सबै खुशी तिम्लाई परोस है ।।
कांडा हैन फुलै फुल होस तिम्रो बाटोमा ।
रुनै परे मै रुला नि तिम्रो साटोमा ।।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
मयाको सम्झना फिर्ता दिनुछ.. 2
किन छोड्यौ बिचैमा जवाफ लिनुछ ।।

कहिले रुवाउँछ मायाले कहिले हासाउँछ ।
टाढा हुँदा आँखाबाट आँशु रसाउँछ  ।।
दुई मुटुको साँचो कथा बोल्छ मायाले ।
आगोले झैं भतभती पोल्छ मायाले ।।
मिलन बिछोड पिरतीको गीतै रै'छ नि ।
पाउनु र गुमाउनु त रितै रै'छ नि ।।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2
मयाको सम्झना फिर्ता दिनुछ.. 2
किन छोड्यौ बिचैमा जवाफ लिनुछ ।।

छैन मलाई गुनासो तिम्रो घातैको ।
मर्नी बेलां पानी पाऊं तिम्रो हातैको ।
रुमाल चिनो छ.. 2

किन छोड्यौ बिचैमा जवाफ लिनुछ ।।

snippet.title: Sajjan Raj Vaidya - Ultaa Paailaa [Official Lyrical Video Release]
snippet.description:
Official lyrical video for Sajjan Raj Vaidya's 'Ultaa Paailaa'.

'Ultaa Paailaa' is a story of circumstance. It is a moment of realization of the inevitable end of love you are forced to step away from. With it, you forever carry the weight of acceptance of what could have been but did not. A unity created and separated by time.

Written | Performed | Produced by:
Sajjan Raj Vaidya

Artwork by: Kailash Subedi (@kailashs)

The Downtown Flux team for 'Ultaa Paailaa':
Kailash Subedi
Nurbu Lama
Sajjan Raj Vaidya
Saumya Karki
Sharif Shrestha

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun​ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

snippet.title: सिमान्त कथा । Simanta Katha - Herne Katha EP54 । हेर्ने कथा
snippet.description:
नेपाल  र भारतको पूर्वी सिमानामा डाँडाँकाँडा छिचोल्दै बग्छ  मेची नदी । मेची नदीकाे घुमाउराे लहरो पछ्याउँदै सिमानाका मान्छेहरु आउजाउ गर्छन् । इलामको सिमान्त गाउँका मान्छेहरु घोडा खच्चड  लिएर सौदा गर्न भारतको नक्सलबारी हाट झर्दा रहेछन् । हाटबाट  फर्किरहेका घोडचढीहरुलाई  हामीले मेची बगरमा भेट्यौं । र उनीहरुसँगै किनारै किनार उकालो लाग्यौं । 

#HerneKatha #SimantaKatha

Stories of people and villages in the mountains of Eastern Nepal bordering India.


Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Become our Patron 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


🚀🚀🚀 Herne  Katha Team 🚀🚀🚀

🎬 Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

🎥 Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

🖥 Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

🎮 Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

📝 Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

👍🏼 Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

✉️ Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

🚍 Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com
👉 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: MADHANYA - Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar | Asees Kaur |Lijo-DJ Chetas| Anshul Garg | Wedding Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Madhanya by Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur featuring Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar. 


Singer: Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur
Music: Lijo George & Dj Chetas
Lyrics: Kumaar
Song Produced by Lijo George
Mixed and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge
Assistant engineer: Pukhraj
Vocals recorded at Soundideaz & Click Studios
Recording Engineers : Kittu & Rupak
Featuring: Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Co - Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Choreographer - Sahil Sharma 
Assistant Choreographer - Rajat 
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
Styled by - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Jib operator - Manish Arora
Line producer  - RS films and production 
Makeup - Rajan Passi
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Madhanya Lyrics : 

Beetein saare mausam
Babul tere ghar mein
Ab chale pav mere
Piya ke shehar mein (2)

Ho Tune Vidayiyan kaise
Likhi Marjaaniyan
Kaise bataye O Rabba
Sahi naiyon jaaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye o mere babula teriyan
Mithiyan yaadan
Mere peeche peeche auniyan haaye
Haaye o mere babula Meriya
Hun gudiyan
Kol tere reh jaaniyan haaye

Kuch bhi nahi hai tere
Kadmon se aage (2)
Tujhse jo baandhe maine
Tootenge na dhaage (2)

Haath mera thaama tune
Teri Meherbaaniyan
Mere naam ab se teri
Saari Pareshaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye




#Madhanya #RahulVaidya #DishaParmar

snippet.title: लेटेस्ट नई रिलीज़ मूवी " रक्षक "हिंदी डब में |नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में | सौंदर्या, ब्रह्मानंदम
snippet.description:
Movie Title: Main Hoon Rakshak (Taraka Ramudu) - South Dubbed Hindi Movies 2014 Full Movie
Genre: Hindi Action Drama Movie
Starcast: Srikant, Saundarya, Brahmanandam
Director: RV Uday Kumar
Ramu (Srikanth) Ek sidha sadha ladka hain. Use padhnaa likhna nahi aata. Wo gaon me akela rehta hain aur logo ke kamo me help karta rehta hain. Usi gaon me me Simran (Soundarya) Officer ban ke aati hain. Wo bahot imandar officer hain. Aur gaon me kisike ghar me rent se rehti hain.

Rangnath jise gaav ke log Bade sahib ke naam se jaante hain wo gaav ke mukhiya hain. Aur unka saala Naidu jiske naam se gaon ke log darte hain wo gaon ke kaamo me lagne wala paisa khata hain. Aur logo pe julm karte rehta hain.

Ramu Aur Simran ki mulakat ek bus me hoti hain. Usi bas me kuchh gunde simaran ko pareshan karte hain. Ramu unn gunde ko maarta hain aur dono me pehchan ho jati hain.

Simran Naidu ke kaamo ka pardafash karne me lag jati hain aur uska jeena mushkil kar deti hain. Naidu Simaran ka ghar khali karva deta hain aur Ramu Simaran ko help karke uske ghar me rehne lagte hain.

Simran gaon ke kaam imandari se karna chahti hain par Naidu use pareshan karte rehta hain. Ek din Simaran Naidu ke kuchh logo ko arrest karvati hain. Phir wahi log simaran ke sath jabardasti karte hain aur Ramu unn logo ko markar Simran ko bachata hain.

Ek Din Simaran ki maa use milane aa jati hain aur Ramu ke bare me use pata chal jata hain ki wo Rangnath ka beta hain. Rangnath ko baat pata chal jati hain aur wo bahot khush ho jata hain Aur Ramu Ko prince bana deta hain par Naidu use kisi tareeke se maarna chahta hain par Ramu bachh jata hain.

Ramu, Naidu aur usake aadmiyo ke beech ladai hoti hai aur burai pe achchai ki jeet hoti hai.

snippet.title: Strange Riddle Behind The Little One | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

An Incident of a little one has created an enigma around CID Team. While searching for the family members, they relate the story with problematic twists and turns. Who is this child? Where did she come from? What is the mystery of her family? Will Team CID be able to solve this case and find the Puzzle? Watch now, To know more.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/galat/RF4DWgxfVF8
♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/galat
♫ Wynk - https://wynk.in/u/HmteEng78
♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/7v02B7tDzQHcPpgXHsZeEm
♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJ6KvryY/
♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B091HTH6ZZ
♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/galat/1561142222?i=1561142475
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎧  Audio Credits

🎤 Singer - Asees Kaur
➟ Music Producer - Sunnyvik
🎶 Composer - Vikas
➟ Lyrics - Raj Fatehpur
➟ Music Produced & Arranged - Sunnyvik & Vikas
➟ Music  Programmer - Arun Maan & Meet Maan
➟ Back Vocals & Alaap - Vikas
➟ Acoustic & Electric Guitar- John Paul
➟ Synth & Piano By - Vikas & Shibashish
➟ Woodwinds - Ajay Parsanna
➟ Mixed & Masterd By - Eric Pillai ( Future Sound Of Bombay )  
➟ Mix Assistant- Michael Edwin Pillai

➟ Poster Design - Aman Khalsi

🎬 Video Credits
➟ Featuring - Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra & Asees Kaur
➟ Produced By - Black And White
➟ Directors - Dilsher Singh And Khushpal Singh
➟ Concept And Creative Director - Pooja Gujral
➟ Asst Dir - Gurdeep And Bunty 
➟ DOP - Robbo 
➟ Editor - Garry Khatrao
➟ Colorist - Onkar
➟ Production Manager - V Sign

● Paras Team

➟ Personal Boy - Irfan Sheikh
➟ Stylist - Minal

● Rubina Team
➟ Stylist - Ashna Makhijani
➟ Hair - Sharda Jhadhav 
➟ Make up - Jignesh Shah
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
📝 Lyrics

Warka Hauli Hauli Karke Palat Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Oh Kise Hor Da Hona Chahunde Ne
Mainu Jhootha Pauna Chahunde Ne
Main Samjh Geyi han
Zindagi Cho Mainu Dhakka dena Chahunde Ne

Mere Nal Nal Eh Khali Khali
Falak Roo Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Main Waqt Kina Barbad Kara
Jad Bewafa Nu Yaad Kara
Main Paagal Ajj vi Har Kam Nu
Tera Naam Len Baad Kara

RAJ RAJ Main Yaad 
Teri Vich Khud Nu Kho Rahi
Main Ajj v Dardi Loka Ton
Barish Vich Roo Rahi

Dhokha Mere Nal Haye
Ab Talak Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Kabhi Kabhi Tere Dard Mein Haye Sharaab Bhi Piti Hoon
Maine Suna Main Tere Chehre Se Dikhayi Deti Hoon

Mera Jeena Mera Jeena Zeher Ho Gya Hai
Mera Dil Mujhse Rooth Gya Haye Gair Ho Gya Hai

Pal Pal Mereya Saaha Da
Haye Katal Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

snippet.title: CHOTU DADA KI JADUI MOTOR | छोटू दादा की जादुई मोटर | Khandesh Hindi Comedy | Chotu Comedy Video
snippet.description:
छोटू दादा के पास है एक जादुई मोटर जिससे छोटू दादा निकाल रहा है पेट्रोल, और लोगो को दे रहा है सस्ता पेट्रोल, आखिर इस जादुई मोटर का क्या राज़ है, देखिये छोटू दादा का कॉमेडी से भरपूर मज़ेदार वीडियो.

#LakeSide_TV_Nepal #Binod_Anita_Khadka_New_Update #Binod_Khadka_Anita_Khadka


तपाइको समाज, छिमेक, वरपर, कुनैपनि घटना, समाचार, अन्यायमा परेर न्याय नपाएका व्यक्ति, कला र अचम्म अचम्मका प्रतिभा भएका व्यक्ति छन् भने हामीलाई सिधा सम्पर्क गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ |

र

तपाइँ गीत, संगीत र म्युजिक भिडियो सम्बन्धि सम्पूर्ण काम गर्न चाहनुहुन्छ र हाम्रो च्यानलमा म्युजिक भिडियो र भिडियो राख्न चाहनुहुन्छ भने पनि सम्पर्क गर्नुहोला |

snippet.title: Mystifying Glasses | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

People are supporting a lady over Domestic Violence and as the offence at the area go down with peace. There an incident takes place where an attack has been violated. People are rushing over the mystery of danger in the locality with the profound mystery of mystic goggles. What is happening around? Where is the Culprit? What is the tragedy behind mysterious specs? Will CID be able to find the Culprit?
Find out, what happens next!

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 2 | Teacher Sahi Hona Chahiye
snippet.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn’t have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center, or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. Radha’s father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || मेरी बास्सै || Ep.-698 || April-13-2021|| फेसन शो बिशेष || By Media Hub
snippet.description:
Ghar Jwai has come up with an interesting idea for a fashion show contest. Watch your favorite stars in a new look today and find out who wins by watching the episode!

Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

About Super Dancer 4 : 
---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

snippet.title: Z.D. Businessman (2021) New Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | 2021 New South Hindi Dubbed Movies
snippet.description:
Movie Will Premiere At 7:30 PM

The movie follows the inspiring tale of an entrepreneur, Joy Thakolkaaran, who owns a firm named 'Punyalan Agarbathis'. The firm in involved in the production of incense sticks from elephant dung. The first half moves around how it becomes nearly impossible for him to acquire necessary raw material (elephant dung) and when he finally does acquire it devil follows him in the form of a hartal. Struggling between the deadline given by the court and the unexpected hartal, he decides to smuggle the raw material on the day of the hartal. When the RIP followers get wind of this they attack joy and destroy his godown and means of transportation. The rest of the movie revolves around how Joy is pressured with various problems around him and how help comes from the unexpected. The party uses different methods to mentally depreciate Joy. But he overcomes them by his optimistic attitude and his friends and family. In the end of the movie the tag line reads "you can conquer the whole world if you are ready to believe in yourself"

Click to Susbscribe Us: http://goo.gl/Bscph8

snippet.title: Size Zero (2021) NEW RELEASED Full Hindi Dubbed South Movie | Anushka Shetty, Arya & Prakash Raj
snippet.description:
Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj). 

Censor Certification Number:- VIL/2/41/2021-MUM

StarCast:- Anushka Shetty, Arya, Prakash Raj, Sonal Chauhan

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3145 - 15th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3145: 
-----------------------
Tapu Sena is extremely happy and inform everyone that Popatlal's marriage is finally fixed and that Pooja is going to come to Gokuldham society later to meet everyone. Iyer informs that men of the society about Popatal's marriage and that news makes everyone happy. Popatlal arrives in the society inside an auto and proceeds to chat with Tapu Sena and Abdul. Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Major Teaser| Hindi| 26/11 Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan| Adivi Sesh| Saiee| Sobhita| Mahesh Babu
snippet.description:
Here is the Hindi #MajorTeaser from #MajorTheFilm. Also releasing in Telugu and Malayalam.
'The film #Major speaks about the way he lived, not about the way he lost his life.' Based on the life of real-life Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, Major, the film, aims to show how this valiant soldier saved the lives of numerous hostages before being martyred by the terrorists who wreaked havoc in the Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, India on the 26th of November, 2008. Major, an Indian film, releasing in Telugu, Hindi and Malayalam is produced by Sony Pictures Films India in association with Mahesh Babu's GMB Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and A+S Movies.

 

Starring Adivi Sesh, Saiee Manjrekar, Sobhita Dhulipala, Prakash Raj, Revathi, Murali Sharma

Produced by : Sony Pictures Films India, GMB Entertainment and A+S Movies

Directed by : Sashi Kiran Tikka

Story and Screenplay : Adivi Sesh

Script Guidance and Telugu Dialogue : Abburi Ravi

Cinematography: Vamsi Patchipulusu

Music : Sri Charan Pakala

Lyrics : Ramajogayya Sastry (Telugu)

Production Designer: Avinash Kolla

Editor : Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi &  Kodati Pavan Kalyan

Action Choreography : Sunil Rodrigues

Executive Producer : Rajiv Bharadwaj

Hindi Dialogues : Akshat Ajay Sharma

Costume Designer : Rekha Boggarapu

VFX Supervisor : CV Rao

Post Production : Annapurna Studios

Publicity Designs : Anil-Bhanu

Sound Design: Ethi Raaj

P.R.: Vamsi-Shekar (Telugu), Sanchita Trivedi (Hindi), Athira Diljith (Malayalam)

Digital Agency: First Show (Telugu), White Rivers Media (Hindi)
 

Please join the microsite to share your tribute: https://majorthemovie.sonypicturesindia.com

Survivors, the wait is finally over! Dance like it's in your DNA and join Hrithik Roshan a.k.a Jai as he takes over Bermuda this #FreeFireHoli! 🕺🏻💃🏻🎨
Let us know what you think about the music video in the comments section below!👇

Featuring: Hrithik Roshan
Composed by Vishal-Shekhar
Lyrics by Kumaar
Music Produced & Recorded by Meghdeep Bose
Mixed and Mastered by Hanish Taneja


Cast: Toranj Kayvon 
Choreographer: Sanjay Shetty
Directed by Anuj Samtani 
Executed by: UMG for Brands
Produced by: ABP Studios
Head of Production: Ricky Saxena
Creative Director: Shivi Kumar, Harman Singha
Written by: Harman Singha 
Cinematographer: Tarun Achpal
Line Producer: Praveen Das
Prod Design: Durgaprasad Mahapatra
VFX: Pixel Studios
Stunts: Force Square 
Editor: Kuso Communications
Costumes: Nivedita

#DNAMeinDance #UnleashYourTrueColours #FreeFireHoli #IndiaKaBattleRoyale
--------------
Lyrics:

Koi roke bhi toh kaha rukne wale hai
Hum aasma hai kaha jukne wale hai

Dil Mai chupe hai jo
Rang dikhaenge
Hai jeetney ki aadat
(Booyah)
Hum jeet te hi jayenge

Seene mai thirakti saas ho
Miss na abh yeh chance ho

Chal nache aise jaise DNA mein Dance Ho
DNA mein Dance
DNA mein Dance
 
Seene mai thirakti saas ho
Miss na abh yeh chance ho

Chal nache aise jaise DNA mein Dance Ho
DNA mein Dance
DNA mein Dance

Dil ke iraade halke nahi hai
Hum toh Khiladi doh pal ke nahi hai
  
Dil Mai chupe hai jo
Rang dikhaenge
Hai jeetney ki aadat
(Booyah)
Hum jeet te hi jayenge

Booyah!

Chal nache aise jaise DNA mein Dance Ho

snippet.title: बदली राजकुमार 🤴 The Swapped Prince  in Hindi 🌜 Bedtime Story in Hindi | WOA Fairy Tales
snippet.description:
बदली राजकुमार 🤴 The Swapped Prince  in Hindi 🌜 Bedtime Story in Hindi | WOA Fairy Tales
लोग WOA फेयरी टेल्स पर अधिक कहानियां देख सकते हैं
- हिंदी:- सभी वीडियो: https://bit.ly/2IUIMnW 

#वोआफेयरीटेल्सइंग्लिश    
#वोआफेयरीटेल्स
#इंग्लिशफेयरीटेल्स

फेयरी टेल्स चैनल बच्चों के लिए दिलचस्प परी कथा कहानियां प्रदान करता है जो रचनात्मक और रंगीन तरीके से दिखाई जाती  हैं। इसके अलावा, इन सब में शैक्षिक बातें भी शामिल हैं जिसका उद्देश्य आपके बच्चों को स्वाभाविक रूप से और धीरे से शिक्षित करना है। हमारी सूचि को इन श्रेणियों में विभाजित किया गया है: कल्पित, लोककथा, जादुई, पौराणिक, किंवदंती और कथाएं जो हर विशिष्ट प्लेलिस्ट में पाई जा सकती हैं। आशा है कि आप सभी हमारे चैनल का आनंद लेंगे और नए अपलोड किए गए वीडियो की सूचना प्राप्त करने के लिए कृपया सब्सक्राइब करें । 


अस्वीकरण                                                                                                                                                                                               
► WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी और इसके सभी वीडियो शीर्षक 16 C.F.R के अर्थ में "बच्चों को निर्देशित नहीं" हैं। §312.2 बच्चों की ऑनलाइन गोपनीयता सुरक्षा अधिनियम (यूएसए) 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों के लिए नहीं है। WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी और उसके मालिक (ओं), एजेंटों, प्रतिनिधियों, और कर्मचारियों ने 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से कोई जानकारी एकत्र नहीं की और 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से जानकारी एकत्र करने के लिए किसी भी तीसरे पक्ष को स्पष्ट रूप से अनुमति नहीं दी। WOA फेयरी टेल्स की ओर से - हिंदी। इसके अलावा, WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी, YouTube और इसके एजेंटों और सहायक कंपनियों, या किसी भी अन्य संबद्ध तीसरे पक्ष की प्रथाओं और नीतियों, डेटा संग्रह के बारे में किसी भी और सभी दायित्व या जिम्मेदारी से इनकार करता है।       इस चैनल में सभी ऑडियो और विज़ुअल कंटेंट SCONNECT CO, LTD, audiojungle.net के स्वामित्व में हैं और क्रिएटिव कॉमन्स रिविज़न के तहत लाइसेंस प्राप्त हैं।

- WOA Fairy Tales - Tiếng Việt: https://go.woanetwork.com/WoaFairyTalesTiengViet

Camera- Sanjaya Pokharel 

हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ,
 के तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला छ ?, तपाई नजिकका व्यक्ति पो त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान हुनुहुन्छ कि ?, या समाजमा कोहि अन्यायमा परेको, असक्त, दुखि  ,पिडित पो हुनुहुन्छ कि ? यदि छ या देख्नुभयो भने हाम्रो सम्पर्क नम्बर +9779808074106 सन्तोष पौडेल लाइ सम्पर्क गरि सामाजिक दायित्व पुरा गरौ, पिडितलाई राहत दिलाउन आजै बाट हातेमालो गरौ l

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || मेरी बास्सै || Ep.-696 || March-30-2021|| Volleyball Special || By Media Hub
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

snippet.title: स्पाइक द हेजहोग-मैन 👦 Spike The Hedgehog-man 🌜 Bedtime Story in Hindi | WOA Fairy Tales
snippet.description:
स्पाइक द हेजहोग-मैन 👦 Spike The Hedgehog-man 🌜 Bedtime Story in Hindi | WOA Fairy Tales
लोग WOA फेयरी टेल्स पर अधिक कहानियां देख सकते हैं
- हिंदी:- सभी वीडियो: https://bit.ly/2IUIMnW 

#वोआफेयरीटेल्सइंग्लिश    
#वोआफेयरीटेल्स
#इंग्लिशफेयरीटेल्स

फेयरी टेल्स चैनल बच्चों के लिए दिलचस्प परी कथा कहानियां प्रदान करता है जो रचनात्मक और रंगीन तरीके से दिखाई जाती  हैं। इसके अलावा, इन सब में शैक्षिक बातें भी शामिल हैं जिसका उद्देश्य आपके बच्चों को स्वाभाविक रूप से और धीरे से शिक्षित करना है। हमारी सूचि को इन श्रेणियों में विभाजित किया गया है: कल्पित, लोककथा, जादुई, पौराणिक, किंवदंती और कथाएं जो हर विशिष्ट प्लेलिस्ट में पाई जा सकती हैं। आशा है कि आप सभी हमारे चैनल का आनंद लेंगे और नए अपलोड किए गए वीडियो की सूचना प्राप्त करने के लिए कृपया सब्सक्राइब करें । 


अस्वीकरण                                                                                                                                                                                               
► WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी और इसके सभी वीडियो शीर्षक 16 C.F.R के अर्थ में "बच्चों को निर्देशित नहीं" हैं। §312.2 बच्चों की ऑनलाइन गोपनीयता सुरक्षा अधिनियम (यूएसए) 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों के लिए नहीं है। WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी और उसके मालिक (ओं), एजेंटों, प्रतिनिधियों, और कर्मचारियों ने 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से कोई जानकारी एकत्र नहीं की और 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से जानकारी एकत्र करने के लिए किसी भी तीसरे पक्ष को स्पष्ट रूप से अनुमति नहीं दी। WOA फेयरी टेल्स की ओर से - हिंदी। इसके अलावा, WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी, YouTube और इसके एजेंटों और सहायक कंपनियों, या किसी भी अन्य संबद्ध तीसरे पक्ष की प्रथाओं और नीतियों, डेटा संग्रह के बारे में किसी भी और सभी दायित्व या जिम्मेदारी से इनकार करता है।       इस चैनल में सभी ऑडियो और विज़ुअल कंटेंट SCONNECT CO, LTD, audiojungle.net के स्वामित्व में हैं और क्रिएटिव कॉमन्स रिविज़न के तहत लाइसेंस प्राप्त हैं।

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.description:
मेरो बाउआमा म आफै पाल्छु भन्दै डाक्टरकी बैनीले आक्रोश पोखिन, चौकीमै पर्यो झगडा 

#LakeSide_TV_Nepal #DoctorNewsNepal


तपाइको समाज, छिमेक, वरपर, कुनैपनि घटना, समाचार, अन्यायमा परेर न्याय नपाएका व्यक्ति, कला र अचम्म अचम्मका प्रतिभा भएका व्यक्ति छन् भने हामीलाई सिधा सम्पर्क गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ |

र

तपाइँ गीत, संगीत र म्युजिक भिडियो सम्बन्धि सम्पूर्ण काम गर्न चाहनुहुन्छ र हाम्रो च्यानलमा म्युजिक भिडियो र भिडियो राख्न चाहनुहुन्छ भने पनि सम्पर्क गर्नुहोला |

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Video) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai | Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you Bepanah Pyaar composed and sung by Payal Dev collaborating up with the talented singer Yasser Desai for the first time. Reuniting after their successful pairing together in Naagin 5, Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra’s sizzling chemistry is sure make you fall in love with them all over again. This beautiful romantic song has been written by veteran Bollywood lyricist Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev.

#VYRLOriginals #SurbhiChandna #SharadMalhotra

Directed by Arif Khan, the stunning video narrates a thrilling story of love, treachery and action with a surprising plot twist in the end. Do comment & mention below your favourite #sharbhi moments from the video.

localized.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Video) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai | Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
localized.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you Bepanah Pyaar composed and sung by Payal Dev collaborating up with the talented singer Yasser Desai for the first time. Reuniting after their successful pairing together in Naagin 5, Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra’s sizzling chemistry is sure make you fall in love with them all over again. This beautiful romantic song has been written by veteran Bollywood lyricist Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev.

#VYRLOriginals #SurbhiChandna #SharadMalhotra

Directed by Arif Khan, the stunning video narrates a thrilling story of love, treachery and action with a surprising plot twist in the end. Do comment & mention below your favourite #sharbhi moments from the video.

snippet.title: सेन्मिखाको कथा । Senmikhako Katha । Herne  Katha EP52 । हेर्ने कथा
snippet.description:
वर्षौंपछि पनि याद आइरहने सेन्मिखालाई भेट्न हामी फेरि चखेवा गयौं । क्षितिजलाई अँगालो हालेर बसेको लोभलाग्दा डाँडा, सल्लाघारी अनि भेडा चर्ने पाटनहरु सम्झिँदै । अनि सम्झिँदै त्यो एकान्तमा वनपाखा गुन्जाउने सेन्मिखाका भाकाहरुलाई 
#Senmikha #HerneKatha

Story of Senmikha, a young shepherd  from Chakhewa, Bhojpur. 

Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Become our Patron 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


🚀🚀🚀 Herne  Katha Team 🚀🚀🚀

🎬 Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

🎥 Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

🖥 Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

🎮 Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

📝  Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

👍🏼 Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

✉️ Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

🚍 Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com
👉 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.
